signal_evidence.capex_direction: There's no change to our full year outlook. We continue to expect 2023 OPEX prior to SBC to be in the range of $1.42 billion to $1.48 billion.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: We've kept the rebates on our crypto offering the same... we want to make sure that we offer great pricing to customers.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: While a year ago, we had our lowest quarter of adjusted EBITDA, in Q1, we matched our all-time high... our Q1 adjusted EBITDA margin of 26% was an all-time high.
